missingScenarioTitles: Search for Arc Mechanical Keyboard and Add to Cart Successfully

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Search for Arc Mechanical Keyboard and Add to Cart Successfully
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: This is a stable, repeatable happy-path flow with predictable UI elements such as search input, search button, product listing, Add to Cart button, and cart summary. All interactions and assertions can be reliably scripted in Playwright using selectors, text matching, and URL navigation checks. It is a high-priority regression candidate.
